title: Pritzelia coccinea
taxonomy: Pritzelia coccinea is classified as a genus in the family Rutaceae, which is commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and its botanical features. The Rutaceae family is a group of flowering plants that includes citrus fruits, rue, and other related species. Pritzelia coccinea is a species within this genus and is native to the Americas. Further classification of Pritzelia coccinea may also include its order, class, and kingdom, but its family and genus are well established in botanical nomenclature.
